stages.title: Export official SellerSprite candidate sheet
browser_actions: start an OpenClaw-controlled Chrome session with a valid SellerSprite login
open SellerSprite Product Research
prefer the saved preset label 中件FBM when it is visible
otherwise apply the canonical US + 30-Day + FBM medium-parcel query mapping
click Search Now and wait for results
click Export on the results page
open My Exported Data
wait for the newest Product Research export to reach Completed
download the official xlsx file
validate the xlsx artifact

stages.title: Collect Amazon metrics for every alternate keyword
browser_actions: load the full unique alternate-keyword queue from stage 2
prefer the non-browser hybrid collector instead of browser rendering once Amazon front-end browser flow shows instability
fetch exact Amazon search HTML for each unique alternate keyword with stability-first pacing
extract the keyword result count and first-page ASIN or link set from raw Amazon HTML
fetch SellerSprite quick-view metrics for the exact first-page ASIN set through authenticated extension API calls
join Amazon first-page ASINs with SellerSprite sales and listing-age fields
treat Amazon HTTP block pages and repeated non-200 responses as circuit-breaker signals instead of acceptable output
run this stage under OpenClaw doctor monitoring and persist checkpoints
write the unique keyword metrics table
expand the collected metrics back onto every alternate-keyword entry
